highlights: Bundle Shape (agents/stampede-commander.agent.md:240-267) omits source_refs, adopted_consensus, proposal_ids, review_ids, improvement_ids, broadcast_ids.
source_refs only required in runtime prompt prose (bin/stampede.sh:910).
Merger agent has zero collab/ledger awareness; only consumes results/*.json.
No JSON Schema or runtime validator for bundle anywhere.
Worker atom evidence format inconsistent across run.

evidence.note: Bundle required_fields: task_id, run_id, commander_id, status, role, profile, swarm_scale, per_commander_full_swarm, branch, files_changed, summary, confidence, consensus, telemetry. NO source_refs/adopted_consensus.
protocol required_fields includes 'source_refs'; commander prompt asks for adopted consensus item_ids + source_refs in bundle.json.
no 'collab' or 'ledger' matches; reads results/*.json only at line 51.
wkr-006-001.json uses {path,lines,note}; atm-001.json uses prose file:line strings; no uniform schema.

gaps: Bundle Shape lacks source_refs / adopted_consensus / proposal_ids / review_ids / improvement_ids / broadcast_ids.
Merger never reads collab ledgers; no provenance chain.
Worker atom evidence format not standardized.
No link from bundle items back to ledger msg_ids.
recommendations: Create schemas/bundle.schema.json and validate in merger Phase 1.
Have merger read collab/*.jsonl ledgers and cross-reference bundle claims to ledger msg_ids.
